steps: Go to https://fly.io/ and log in to your account (or create a free account)
Click your profile avatar in the top-right corner and select 'Account settings'
In the left sidebar click 'Access Tokens' (or navigate directly to https://fly.io/user/personal_access_tokens)
Enter a descriptive name for the token (e.g., 'Machines API')
Copy the generated token immediately — it will not be shown again
Use the token as a Bearer token in the Authorization header on requests to https://api.machines.dev/v1

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Personal Access Token
credential_fields.description: A Fly.io personal access token with full account access. Shown only once at creation.

notes: api.machines.dev is the Fly Machines API — it uses the same Fly.io authentication tokens
Personal access tokens have full account-level access; prefer deploy tokens (app-scoped) for CI/CD
Tokens are shown only once at creation — store them securely immediately
Fly.io offers a free tier (Hobby plan) with limited compute and bandwidth included
Alternatively, generate a token using the CLI: fly tokens create org --expiry 8760h

test_endpoint.description: List all apps in your personal organization
